expo.name: Shield Our Elders
expo.description: A simple scam-safety guide for older adults and the people they trust.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Shield Our Elders to scan QR codes so you can check links before opening them.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Shield Our Elders to use the microphone only if you choose an audio safety check.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Shield Our Elders to attach screenshots you choose for a safety check.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Shield Our Elders to scan QR codes so you can check links before opening them.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Shield Our Elders to use the microphone only if you choose an audio safety check.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Shield Our Elders to attach screenshots you choose for a safety check.
